events.agenda: Inaugural Halifax dbt Meetup covering the question of who transforms what when adopting ELT.
events.event_description: An opportunity for Halifax data folks to connect and collaborate, welcoming data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, professionals, students, and hackers.
events.location: CoWork Halifax, 6156 Quinpool Rd, Halifax, NS
events.raw_text:
Tue, Feb 20, 2024 · 5:00 PM to 6:30 PM AST

CoWork Halifax, Halifax, NS

Halifax dbt meetup Q1

17h15 Presentation — Adopting ELT: Who transforms what?

Speaker: Esther Fraser, data analyst & analytics engineer with Vetsource.

talks.description: Considerations for adopting an ELT approach and deciding which team or system is responsible for transforming data.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 17h15 Presentation — Adopting ELT: Who transforms what?
talks.title: Adopting ELT: Who transforms what?

Wed, Jun 26, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 1:30 PM ADT

CoWork Halifax, Halifax, NS

Halifax dbt meetup Q2

12h15 Presentation — Michelle Forrest (Associate Director of Data Solutions, Brooklyn Data Co) on Data Governance

additional_metadata.note: First edition of the recurring Open Workshop segment.

events.agenda: Talk on canonical data models as the missing piece of the analytics development lifecycle, plus an open workshop segment.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.location: CoWork Halifax, 6156 Quinpool Rd, Halifax, NS
events.raw_text:
Wed, Aug 21, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM ADT

CoWork Halifax, Halifax, NS

Halifax dbt Meetup Q3

12h15 Presentation: Canonical Models with Saadat Qadri - The Missing Piece of the Analytics Development Life Cycle. Canonical data models help enhance data consistency and quality, ensuring a unified understanding of data across an organization.
12h45 Open Workshop

talks.description: How canonical data models enhance data consistency and quality, ensuring a unified understanding of data across an organization, similar to GAAP for financial reporting.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 12h15 - 12h45| Presentation: Canonical Models with Saadat Qadri
talks.title: Canonical Models - The Missing Piece of the Analytics Development Life Cycle

additional_metadata.note: Community watch party for the annual Coalesce conference, topics chosen by attendee vote.

events.agenda: A watch party and discussion of selected Coalesce 2024 conference sessions on the dbt Semantic Layer and handling data breakages.
events.event_description: A watch party for the Eastern Canada dbt community to watch and discuss Coalesce 2024 sessions selected by community vote.
events.event_name: dbt Coalesce Watch Party & Conference Recap
events.location: CoWork Halifax, 6156 Quinpool Rd, Halifax, NS
events.raw_text:
Wed, Oct 23, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM ADT

CoWork Halifax, Halifax, NS

dbt Coalesce Watch Party & Conference Recap

Based on community votes, watching "Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer Metrics" and, if time permits, "Don't panic: What to do when your data breaks".

talks.description: A recorded Coalesce 2024 session on utilizing dbt Semantic Layer metrics for late-stage transformations, watched and discussed as a group.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: we'll be watching Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer Metrics
talks.title: Late-stage transformations: Utilizing dbt Semantic Layer Metrics (Coalesce 2024 recording)

additional_metadata.note: Open Workshop made a permanent recurring segment after prior quarter's success.

events.agenda: Talk on DevOps and CI/CD with dbt, covering advanced CI features announced at Coalesce 2024, plus an open workshop segment.
events.event_description: dbt Meetups are networking events open to all folks working with data, with talks predominantly focused on community members' experience with dbt.
events.location: CoWork Halifax, 6156 Quinpool Rd, Halifax, NS
events.raw_text:
Wed, Nov 20, 2024 · 12:00 PM to 2:00 PM AST

CoWork Halifax, Halifax, NS

Halifax dbt Meetup Q4

12h15 Presentation: Data on Autopilot: An Overview of Devops with dbt by Adam Duval. Covers DevOps/CI/CD pipelines with dbt, fundamental concepts through advanced workflow examples, and the latest advanced CI features announced at Coalesce 2024.
12h45 Open Workshop

talks.description: How DevOps and CI/CD pipelines with dbt enhance data workflows by automating transformations, testing, and deployments, including advanced CI features announced at Coalesce 2024.
talks.raw_text_excerpt: 12h15 - 12h45| Data on Autopilot: An Overview of Devops with dbt by Adam Duval
talks.title: Data on Autopilot: An Overview of Devops with dbt
